name: Kingsgate Consolidated Limited.
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$5.7694. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.7345 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.7694, stop A$4.5045, target A$6.0000. Risk/reward is 0.18:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
